summary: Blackout Overrides | Overrides | Page UI Validation
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Blackout Override" tile from the left menu or the Home Page
Then the user should land on the *User Info Lookup* page
And the *User Lookup* tab should be highlighted as the active tab
When the user clicks on the Overrides tab
Then the user should see a *Create Override* button
And the user should see a search bar
And the suer should see a *View* button
And the user should see a table with the following columns:
Country Code | Okta Id | IP Address | Zip Code | Status | Expiration | Created At
